goal: Design and implement a self-reflection system that enables autoagent to analyze its own loop behavior, identify failure patterns, and systematically improve task completion quality.

tasks.title: Audit current loop metrics and failure modes
tasks.description: Analyze orchestrator loop logs, cost-tracker data, and test failures from recent iterations (405–406) to identify where tasks stall, retry patterns, and decision quality degradation.

tasks.title: Design reflection checkpoint structure
tasks.description: Define a `ReflectionCheckpoint` schema (task inputs, outputs, tool calls, cost, duration, success/failure reason) and wire hooks into orchestrator to capture data at task boundaries.

tasks.title: Implement post-task reflection logic in orchestrator
tasks.description: Add a `reflectOnCompletion()` method (~200 LOC) that invokes Claude with task checkpoint data to extract lessons (what worked, what failed, next strategy) and store in session memory.

tasks.title: Create reflection aggregator module
tasks.description: Build `src/reflection-aggregator.ts` (~250 LOC) to batch reflection outputs, detect recurring failure patterns, and generate actionable system prompts for future tool use.

tasks.title: Wire reflection insights into tool-recovery and prompt cache
tasks.description: Modify `tool-recovery.ts` and orchestrator prompt construction to inject pattern-based retry strategies and reflection-derived context into extended thinking.

tasks.title: Add /reflect TUI command and reflection export
tasks.description: Implement `/reflect` command to display current session reflections and export reflection history as JSON for cross-session learning.

tasks.title: Test reflection loop end-to-end with cost/quality metrics
tasks.description: Run 3 test scenarios (simple task, multi-file edit, complex reasoning) and measure if reflection insights reduce retry count and improve final output quality.
